question: What is the application architecture / solution shape?
options: Single full-stack Next.js app with in-process simulation
context: Depends on bfe61279 (Railway hosting). Repo is already a Next.js 16 + React 19 + TS + Tailwind 4 scaffold. Monte Carlo (10k trials x 55 years) is milliseconds in Node. Railway cron calls an internal API route for EOD sync.
